title: Cobblemon: ASAS - Trainer's Influence
description: AllShapesAndSizes - Lite alternative. Your Pokemon is short and it's YOUR fault.
body:
**REQUIRES [PEHKUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) | Optional - Heavily Recommend [Collision Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/collision-fix) (Client)**

###   **This datapack is an alternative (and personal favourite) of [AllShapesAndSizes - Lite](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-asas), more info there.**

Add more variance to Cobblemon by **changing all Pokemon sizes without touching hitboxes!**

**All Pokemon will preserve their size after captured. Every player's party will always be affected with sizing!**

**The type of sizing is extracted from the Trainer's own DNA**, meaning that, in a server, **different players will have differently sized Pokemon!**

Your influence can make your Pokemon either:
- **Bigger**
- **Smaller**
- **Taller**
- **Shorter**
- **Skinnier**
- **Fatter**

_**Should work with any version and any mod/datapack. Purely visual, does not change cobblemon gimmicks.**_ 
![](https://files.catbox.moe/bf3h0u.gif)
## **Since R2.0:**
**If you're using a mod/datapack that uses pehkui to change player size, the Pokemon you send out will match your current size!**

I felt it was appropriate this being the only exception where hitboxes should change.

![ratio gif](https://files.catbox.moe/ol40bl.gif)

##
<details>
<summary>Planned for future versions</summary>


  ## Talkative Version (SOON™):
**Your Pokemon will often times taunt you** for morphing its body

</details>
